shot_notes: Inside, he is overcome by an unnatural drowsiness and collapses into unconsciousness.
evidence_summary: Transition the protagonist from the terrestrial world to the inciting supernatural event.

Carter's horse leads him to a narrow cave entrance on a high trail. After checking Powell, Carter enters the large, ancient chamber. Inside, he is overcome by an unnatural drowsiness and collapses into unconsciousness.
Wide shots of the cave entrance on the cliff
low-angle shots inside the chamber to emphasize scale
